statement: In every magma, Equation 2009 (`x = (y * (z * w)) * (x * x)`) implies Equation 4146 (`x * y = ((x * z) * z) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0620
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z w)) (op x x))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op x z) z) y)
